risk_budget._comment: Placeholders — the real risk model lands in Phase 4. Do not rely on these.

schedule._comment: Daily L1 post-close scan + intraday L2 loop land in later phases.

universe._comment: Phase 1 hand-seeded thematic universe (SPEC §14.3). Widened from the SPEC example book for cross-sectional power. Config over code — edit freely.

eligibility._comment: SPLIT floor (plan §B1): backtest gates on price+ADV ONLY (point-in-time available from bars); the option-liquidity floor applies ONLY to the live watchlist — historical option OI/spread do not exist back to 2022, so applying today's retroactively would be lookahead/survivorship bias.

signal._comment: Deterministic, point-in-time signal params. Frozen a priori (no fitting on test). Changing any of these costs a Bonferroni iteration round (plan §A2).

substance._mode_comment: k=4: mode='fundamentals' → substance = reported revenue YoY (data.fundamentals, XBRL companyfacts, point-in-time via filed dates); names with year-ago TTM revenue < min_base_revenue are dropped (pre-revenue growth on ~0 base is noise). mode='events' uses the k1–k3 event/insider-intensity score below.

backtest._comment: PRE-REGISTERED gate parameters (plan §A). Provisional explore/lockbox dates are subject to the §A0 --audit before judging the signal. Bands: IC<fail=FAIL, fail..green=YELLOW, >=green=GREEN.

edgar._comment: Keyless SEC EDGAR access (plan §B5). UA from .env EDGAR_USER_AGENT (SEC requires a contact UA). Polite rate limit < 10 req/s.

fssd._comment: FSSD (Forced-Supply Secondary Drift) pre-registered params — see PREREG_FSSD.md. FREEZE-A (audit) 2026-05-31. Audit-relevant params are FROZEN. Stage-1 gate-only params (stage1_bands, friction.weights final, cost stub) are placeholders → finalized at FREEZE-B before the Stage-1 gate run; the audit (PREREG §8) is coverage-only, consumes no k-round, and does not read bands.

friction._comment: Short-sale-cost composite; higher = harder/costlier to short. Weights EQUAL for the audit (provisional); finalized at FREEZE-B. Deciles from a TRAILING cross-section (no full-sample lookahead). SI%-of-shares-out ≠ SI%-of-free-float (declared approximation).

deal_size._comment: Secondary conditioner; audit-gated. If extraction recall < min_recall, drop size-conditioning for v1 (friction carries the gate).

stage1_bands._comment: DECIDE AT FREEZE-B (before Stage-1 gate). |CAR| net of cost_stub_bps. Placeholders — NOT frozen.

stage2._comment: Net-of-implied-borrow gate; requires PAID historical options data; ONLY on a Stage-1 pass. Measures best defined-risk structure (short the dear leg), not naive long put.

models._comment: Heterogeneous router config — Phase 3. Stub only.
